case_title: RAFAEL BENHUR VS AMERICAN EXPRESS TRAVEL RELATED SERV US CORP COM et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,605.00 FILED BY RAFAEL BENHUR AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN EXPRESS TRAVEL RELATED SERV US CORP COM T W A AIRLINES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-01-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAFAEL BENHUR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN EXPRESS TRAVEL RELATED SERV US CORP COM T W A AIRLINES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
